name: Site Mapper
description: Phase 1 site mapping module: discovers site structure via robots.txt parsing, sitemap extraction, and BFS crawling with authentication-aware link discovery. Builds a SiteGraph with nodes and edges for subsequent analysis phases.

types.name: _LinkExtractor

fields.name: _current_link
fields.description: Currently open anchor href, or None if not inside <a> tag

fields.name: _current_text
fields.description: Text fragments accumulated inside current <a> tag

types.description: HTML parser that extracts href from <a> tags and action from <form> tags, accumulating link text for anchor tags.

functions.name: normalize_url
functions.description: Normalize a URL: resolve relative URLs against base, strip fragment, lowercase scheme/host, remove default ports, collapse double slashes, strip trailing slash (except root).

inputs.name: base
inputs.description: Base URL for resolving relative URLs

postconditions: Returns empty string if URL lacks scheme or netloc
Scheme and netloc are lowercased
Default ports (:80 for http, :443 for https) are removed
Fragment identifier is removed
Path has double slashes collapsed to single slashes
Trailing slash stripped unless path is root '/'
Relative URLs are resolved against base if provided

functions.name: is_same_origin
functions.description: Check if url has same scheme, host, and port as base_url.
postconditions: Returns True if scheme and netloc (host:port) match
Returns False otherwise

functions.name: extract_links
functions.description: Extract (href, link_text) pairs from HTML by parsing <a> tags and <form> action attributes.
postconditions: Returns list of (href, link_text) tuples
Form actions appear with empty string as link_text
Parsing exceptions are silently suppressed

functions.name: parse_robots_txt
functions.description: Parse robots.txt content to extract disallowed paths and sitemap URLs.

inputs.name: base_url
inputs.description: Base URL for the site (currently unused in implementation)

postconditions: Returns (disallowed_paths, sitemap_urls)
Disallowed paths extracted from 'Disallow:' directives
Sitemap URLs extracted from 'Sitemap:' directives
Empty paths/URLs are filtered out
All values are stripped of whitespace

functions.name: parse_sitemap
functions.description: Parse sitemap XML (handles both sitemap indexes and URL sets) to extract location URLs.
postconditions: Returns list of URLs found in <loc> elements
Handles namespace-prefixed XML
Extracts URLs from both <sitemap> and <url> elements
Returns empty list on XML parse errors

functions.name: _fetch
functions.description: Fetch a URL using aiohttp with optional delay. Returns status code, body, final URL after redirects, and duration in milliseconds.

error_cases.name: network_error
error_cases.condition: Any exception during fetch (timeout, connection error, etc.)

postconditions: Returns (status_code, body, final_url, duration_ms)
Follows redirects automatically
On exception, returns (0, '', original_url, duration_ms)
Body text encoding errors are replaced
30 second total timeout enforced

functions.name: _crawl_pass
functions.description: BFS crawl starting from base_url and seed_urls. Respects max depth, robots.txt, exclude patterns, and auth context. Returns discovered nodes and edges.

inputs.name: seed_urls
inputs.description: Additional URLs to seed the crawl

inputs.name: auth_context
inputs.description: Authentication context for this crawl pass

postconditions: Returns (nodes_dict, edges_list) where keys are normalized URLs
Respects config.crawl.max_nodes limit
Respects config.crawl.max_depth limit
Filters URLs by config.crawl.url_exclude_patterns
Respects robots.txt disallowed paths if config.crawl.respect_robots=True
Does not follow external links if config.crawl.follow_external=False
Nodes marked requires_auth=True if status is 401/403 or auth redirect detected
Edges created for all links found in 200 responses

functions.name: map_site
functions.description: Phase 1 site mapping orchestrator. Fetches robots.txt, parses sitemaps, performs anonymous and authenticated crawl passes, merges results into SiteGraph with auth requirements identified.

inputs.name: framework_routes
inputs.description: Additional routes discovered via framework analysis

postconditions: Returns (SiteGraph, PhaseStatus)
PhaseStatus tracks timing and completion
SiteGraph contains merged nodes from anonymous and authenticated passes
Nodes accessible in both passes marked requires_auth=False
Nodes only in authenticated pass marked requires_auth=True
Nodes only in anonymous pass with no auth indicators marked requires_auth=False
Edges deduplicated by (source, target, auth_context)
Fetches robots.txt and processes sitemaps (including nested)
Adds framework_routes to seed_urls if provided
Authenticated crawl only runs if auth_manager.has_auth=True

structured_side_effects.target: robots.txt, sitemaps, and all crawled URLs

functions.name: __init__
functions.description: _LinkExtractor constructor. Initializes HTMLParser and link collection state.
postconditions: self.links initialized to empty list
self._current_link initialized to None
self._current_text initialized to empty list

functions.name: handle_starttag
functions.description: HTMLParser callback for start tags. Captures href from <a> tags and action from <form> tags.
postconditions: If tag='a' with 'href' attribute, sets _current_link and resets _current_text
If tag='form' with 'action' attribute, appends (action, '') to links
None or empty attribute values default to empty string

functions.name: handle_data
functions.description: HTMLParser callback for text data. Accumulates text content inside <a> tags.
postconditions: If inside <a> tag (_current_link is not None), appends data to _current_text

functions.name: handle_endtag
functions.description: HTMLParser callback for end tags. Finalizes link extraction for tags.
postconditions: If tag='a' and _current_link is set, joins accumulated text and appends (href, text) to links
Resets _current_link and _current_text to None and empty list

invariants: All URLs are normalized before use in graph construction
Crawl respects max_nodes and max_depth limits from config
robots.txt disallowed paths honored when config.crawl.respect_robots=True
External links not followed when config.crawl.follow_external=False
Auth detection: status 401/403 or auth redirect indicates requires_auth=True
Nodes appearing in both anonymous and authenticated passes marked as public (requires_auth=False)
30 second timeout enforced on all HTTP requests

data_access.rationale: Read-only module that fetches and parses web content to build site graph

side_effects.rationale: Makes HTTP GET requests to discover site structure

authority.rationale: Module owns the site discovery and graph construction logic for Phase 1 of webprobe
